title: CISA is reportedly using Anthropic Mythos to audit U.S. government code
friendlyTitle: A U.S. cyber agency is using AI to look for software bugs
summary: Reuters reports that CISA is using Anthropic’s Mythos model to scan U.S. government code repositories for vulnerabilities. Sources said the work is being handled by CISA’s Attack Surface Evaluation team and has already surfaced many issues, though details remain limited.
friendlySummary: Reuters says CISA is using Anthropic’s Mythos AI model to check government code for security problems.
whyItMatters: AI-assisted code review is moving into high-stakes public-sector security work, not just private developer tooling. If effective, these systems could help overworked security teams find bugs faster, but they also raise governance questions about access, validation, and model safeguards.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This matters because AI may help find dangerous bugs faster. But people still need to verify the findings and control how powerful security tools are used.
